prompt: Build a user profile page in Sanctuary style for a fitness app. Show the user's avatar, name, membership badge, stats (workouts completed, total hours, calories burned), and a list of recent achievements with icons.
assertions: Avatar is displayed with rounded corners and shadow
Stats are shown in a grid layout with large serif italic numbers
Achievement list items have hover slide animation (whileHover: x: 10)
Uses inverse-surface dark card for contrast section
Includes motion.div with page entrance animation
Uses bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl glass effect on list container
